# A Luxury Retailer Reduced 98% of EMV-Related Disputes

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Explosive growth leads to increasing disputes for luxury retailers competing in high-end marketplaces that change with every trend. Learn how Sift Dispute Management helped one international brand win more disputes and recover significantly more revenue.

### Find out how one international luxury retailer recouped hundreds of thousands of dollars in revenue with Dispute Management.
